title: Mobile Access for Seniors (MAS)
text:
Mobile Access for Seniors (MAS) - SupportGoWhere
Mobile Access for Seniors (MAS)
Share link
Provides subsidised smartphone and mobile plans to lower-income seniors who want to go digital but cannot afford them.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
2-year mobile plan at $5.10 per month and smartphone from $20.00 (one-time cost)
For Singapore Citizens aged 60 and above who are MSF ComCare or HDB PRS beneficiaries
Pick up at least one basic digital skill at any SG Digital community hub to qualify
Collapse all sections
About this support

Eligible seniors may enjoy the following subsidised product and service:

2-year mobile plan at $5.10 per month

Smartphone from $20.00 (one-time cost)

The subsidised plan will come with:

Free SIM card registration

Free caller ID

Unlimited incoming local calls

Continued mobile data connectivity with no excess data charges

Other value-added services

Who is this for?

60 years old and above (based on birth year)

Singapore Citizen

Current beneficiary of any of these government assistance schemes:

MSF’s ComCare Long Term Assistance (LTA)

MSF’s ComCare Short-to-Medium Term Assistance (SMTA)

HDB’s Public Rental Scheme

Not an existing IMDA Home Access beneficiary who has received a smartphone

How to apply?

For eligible seniors only:

Step 1: Attend our Seniors Go Digital programme at any SG Digital community hub^ and pick up at least 1 basic skill. Such skills include:

Digital communication

Navigating government digital services

Transacting with e-payments

Step 2: Collect the MAS redemption voucher from our Digital Ambassadors.

Step 3: Redeem the voucher at participating telcos.




Visit the Digital for Life website or call 6377 3800 to find your nearest hub.

Only 1 registration per senior is required.




^SG Digital community hubs are located at selected Community Clubs/Centres and public libraries. Visit the Digital for Life website or call 6377 3800 to find your nearest hub. As the hubs will be closed on public holidays, please check the Digital for Life website for updates on opening dates and hours.

Where can I find help?

View more details

IMDA hotline: 6377 3800

Submit an enquiry

Visit your nearest SG Digital community hub

Scheme last updated 19 Feb 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
